---
title: "People"
subtitle: "Faculty, students, alumni, and collaborators of BioMIND"
description: "Researchers and trainees across BioMIND's member labs at the University of Central Florida."
---

BioMIND brings together faculty, graduate students, undergraduates, alumni, and collaborators across UCF and beyond. Profiles are organized by category below.

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
[👥]{.bm-card-icon}
### Faculty
Principal investigators leading BioMIND's research thrusts and member labs.

[View faculty →](faculty.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card}
[🎓]{.bm-card-icon}
### Students
Graduate and undergraduate researchers across the cluster's labs.

[View students →](students.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card}
[🌟]{.bm-card-icon}
### Alumni
Former members now in academia, industry, and government.

[View alumni →](alumni.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card}
[🤝]{.bm-card-icon}
### Collaborators
Partners across UCF, other universities, industry, government, and nonprofits.

[View collaborators →](../collaborators/index.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

:::

::: {.bm-callout .bm-callout-gold}
**Profile collection in progress.** Faculty and student profiles are being collected. If you are a BioMIND member, please see the README for the content checklist and submit your materials to the cluster coordinator.
:::
